column2: Verify Error Message When Creating User Story During Dusk/Night
column3: ['Launch the system and verify it is in operation during dusk or night. ', 'Create a new user story related to noise species disturbance at dusk/night. ', 'Save the newly created user story. ', 'Verify if an error message is displayed indicating that such a user story is not allowed. ']
column4: ['The system displays indicators showing that it operates at those times. ', 'A new user story with relevant details about noise species disturbances during dusk or night is created. ', 'The user story is saved in the system. ', 'An error message appears, stating that creating this type of user story is not allowed. ']
